settings.title: Settings
settings.compactDesc: Compact fits more of the editor into a 1080p screen. Default restores the roomier layout.
settings.dualDecoderDesc: Extra decoder lane for variable-speed clips in transitions. Uses more memory.
settings.defaultModelDesc: Used when transcription starts without an explicit model override.
settings.defaultLanguageDesc: Choose Auto-detect to infer the language, or lock transcription to a known language for faster startup.
settings.noLocalRuntimes: No local inference runtimes are active or resident.
settings.clearProjectCacheDesc: Waveforms, filmstrips, GIF frames, decoded audio
settings.clearCacheConfirmDesc: This will delete cached waveforms, filmstrips, GIF frames, and decoded audio for the current project ({{count}} media items). These will be regenerated automatically when needed. Your project data, media files, thumbnails, and proxies will not be affected.
settings.regenerateThumbnailsDesc: Re-create media library thumbnails for this project
settings.deleteProxiesDesc: Remove generated proxy videos for this project

projects.name: Name
projects.getStarted: Get started by creating your first video project. Choose your resolution, frame rate, and start editing!
projects.noResults: No projects found matching your search.
projects.selectDestination: Select where to extract media files
projects.useNewFolderHint: Use "New Folder" in picker if needed
projects.cannotSelectSystem: Cannot select system folders directly. Use "New Folder" in the picker to create a folder first, then select it.
projects.failedSelectDestination: Failed to select destination folder. Please try a different location.
projects.folderTryDifferent: folder. Try selecting a different location.
projects.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete
projects.confirmDeleteSuffix: ? This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the project and all its contents.
projects.alsoDeleteLocal: Also delete local files on disk
projects.removeFilesFrom: Remove files from the linked folder
projects.projectDeletedNotFiles: Project deleted but local files were not removed
projects.filesystemCleanupFailed: Filesystem cleanup failed — you may need to delete the folder manually.
projects.noProjectsFoundDesc: We couldn't find any projects matching your search criteria. Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
projects.setupWorkspace: Set up your video editing workspace

hotkeys.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
hotkeys.subtitle: select a command, then record a new combo
hotkeys.failedImport: Failed to import keyboard shortcut preset
hotkeys.sectionPlaybackBlurb: Transport, frame stepping, and timeline jumps.
hotkeys.sectionEditingBlurb: Clip edits, delete flows, and precise canvas nudging.
hotkeys.sectionToolsBlurb: Tool switching for timeline editing modes.
hotkeys.sectionHistoryUIBlurb: Timeline history, zoom, and UI toggles.
hotkeys.sectionClipboardBlurb: Copy, cut, and paste commands shared across editor surfaces.
hotkeys.sectionKeyframesBlurb: Keyframe editor actions and view switching.
hotkeys.clearKeyframes: Clear all keyframes from selected items
hotkeys.keyframeEditorGraph: Switch keyframe editor to graph view
hotkeys.keyframeEditorDopesheet: Switch keyframe editor to dopesheet view
hotkeys.sectionSourceMonitorBlurb: In and out points plus insert and overwrite edits.

projectMediaMatch.title: Match Project To First Video?
projectMediaMatch.description: "{{fileName}}" is the first video added to this project.
projectMediaMatch.descriptionNoFile: The first imported video can define the project size and frame rate.
projectMediaMatch.fpsWasRounded: FreeCut matches imported video to the closest supported project frame rate. This clip would use {{fps}} fps.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.description: You have unsaved changes in {{projectName}}. Would you like to save before leaving?
unsavedChanges.descriptionNoName: You have unsaved changes. Would you like to save before leaving?

projectUpgrade.title: Upgrade Project Before Opening
projectUpgrade.description1: {{projectName}} was saved with project schema v{{storedVersion}}, but this build expects v{{currentVersion}}.
projectUpgrade.description2: FreeCut can upgrade it for you before loading the editor. A backup of the pre-upgrade project will be created first so you can restore the old data if anything looks off.

clearKeyframes.descriptionAll: Are you sure you want to clear all keyframes from {{count}} clips?
clearKeyframes.descriptionProperty: Are you sure you want to clear all {{property}} keyframes from {{count}} clips?
clearKeyframes.canUndo: This action can be undone with Ctrl+Z.

missingMedia.title: Missing Media Files
missingMedia.description: {{count}} media files could not be located.
missingMedia.descriptionSingular: 1 media file could not be located.

unsupportedAudioCodec.title: Unsupported Audio Codec
unsupportedAudioCodec.descriptionSingle: This file uses an audio codec that cannot be decoded in the browser. Audio waveform visualization will not be available.
unsupportedAudioCodec.descriptionPlural: {{count}} files use an audio codec that cannot be decoded in the browser. Audio waveform visualization will not be available.
unsupportedAudioCodec.note: Video playback and editing will work normally. Only audio waveform display is affected.

orphanedClips.title: Missing Media References
orphanedClips.description: {{count}} timeline clips reference media that no longer exists.
orphanedClips.descriptionSingular: 1 timeline clip references media that no longer exists.
